titleStmt.title: SII 16.18: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 18. (A.R. No. 313 of 1922.) TAṀBAḶḶAPALLE, MADANAPALLE TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up by the roadside in a field to the east of the village.
This is dated Śaka 1327, Pārthiva, Śrāvaṇa śu. 10, Friday, corresponding to 1405 A.D., August 5. The week-day, however, was Wednesday.

It records that on the representation of the temple priests, king Vīra Dēvarāya I ruling from Penugoṇḍapaṭṇa, confirmed the gift of the village Taṁmaḍiyarahaḷi and the income of 25 honnu derived from the kāṇike realised from the Śivarātri festivals formerly made by Kaṁpaṇṇoḍeya and Chikkoḍeya to god Mallikārjuna at Chandragiri and ordered that the 25 honnu that was being paid to the palace till then be remitted to the temple from Tāraṇa, Kārtika śu. 1 corresponding to 1404 A.D., October 5. Also records the apportioning of the shares between the priests of the temple.
The record is written partly in Kannaḍa and partly in Telugu as in No. 17 above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīśubhaśāsanābhyudaya śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1327 Agunē
ṭi pā¨rtiva saṁvatsara śrāvaṇa śu 10 śu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēpārtiva is engraved on the word rudhirōdgāri .
svara harirāyavibhāḷa bāśakatappuvarāyaragaṁḍa pū¨rvvapaścimada
kṣaṇōttara catusamudrādhipati rājādhirāja rājaparamēsvara śrīvīra
harihararāyani ga¨rbbaratnākaruṁḍayina śrīma(ṁ)nmahāmaṁḍalēśvara śrīvīradēva
rāyamahārāyaḍu penugoṁḍa paṭnamaṁdu vajrasiṁhvāsanādhīsvaruṁḍayi suka
saṁgatāvinōdaṁbula pritvirājyamu cēyucuṁnu mā¨rjavāḍiyanāḍa O
ḷageyiha caṁdragiriya mallikā¨rjunadēvēṁdra Anādipū¨rvvadalu saṁdubahaṁ
tā taṁmaḍiyarahaḷiyaṁba puravanū sivarātri mōdalāgi bahaṁtā kā
ṇikevanū kaṁpaṁṇoḍeyara kāladalū cikkoḍayara kāladalū Ā dēvara kāṇi
ke Ā dēvarige sa¨rvamānyavāgi daḍisibahudeṁdu Ā pūjārigaḷu taṁmakayina
sādhanagaḷanū namage tōri bhiṁnaha māḍidare nāvu Ā mareyāde Aramane
ge Etibaha varahaṇa yipataAyidu hōṁnanū tāraṇasaṁvatsara kā¨rttika su 1 Ā ra
bhyavāgi Ā dēvara sivarātri kāṇike varuṣavaruṣake Etibaha varahaṇa yipataA
yidu hoṁnanū Ā dēvara Āmrutapaḍige salisabahadu Aramanige Etalāgadu yeṁdu
mayilapage nirūpa mā¨rjavāḍiyanāḍa Adhikārigaḷanū karisi Āstānake kāṇi
ke geUdu yillade Āgi ĒnuḍuUdu Ā sivarātri mōdalāgi bahaṁta kāṇike
hōṁnanū puravanū Ā dēvara AmrutapaḍigeU Aṣṭabhōgatējēsvāṁmyasayitavāgi
Ācaṁdrā¨rkastāhiĀgi Adhigārisuṁkigataḷavāraru beṭe biḍāravanū ĀU
du yilade sa¨rvamānyavāgi saluUdu yi caṁdragiri malligā¨rjuna dēvara śrīpāda
nēvakulayina stānāpatulu yi puramu catusīmalōnānu yi stānamaṁdune vace phala
vastulu yi mahārāyaniki puṁṇyamugānu dēvaraku sama¨rppiṁpi Ā dēsādhipati
vastuUlu Anubhaviṁpi pūjāvidhānaparulaina stānāpatulu pedamala jiyyala
cānajiyyala tamaku celle Ārokapāluṁnu malejiyalaku vakapāluṁnu lekka
nu cānajiyyalaku mūḍupāḍlaleka nanubhaviṁturu sādajiyyalānu
yalajiyyalānu tamaku cele Ārokapāluṁnū sarigā nanubhaviṁturu koṁ
ḍajiyyalānu celajiyyalānu tamaku cele Ārokapālunuṁ sarigā nanubhavi
ṁturu mārajiyyala peddajiyyala vīri taṁmulakuṁnu vīrikiṁni tama
ku cele Ārokapāluṁnu Anubhaviṁturu maṁḍemu malajiyyalānu Ā
tani taṁmulukunu cānajiyyalakuṁnu tamabāvagārikini tamaku
cele Arokapāluṁnu reṁḍu sakamulu sēsi sarigā nanubhaviṁturu
raṁgajiyyala gaṁdhajiyyala tamaku cele Ārokapāluṁnu sarigā nanubhaviṁtu
ru yi mahārāyalu sēsinadha¨rmmaṁ pritiviṁnākāsamuṁcaṁdrasū¨ryyulu
kalaṁta gālamuṁnu celagaladi yī dha¨rmmaṁ sēsi paṭṭābhisiktuḍayi hima
sētupariyaṁtamuṁnēli sakaḷadha¨rma Ācārālunuyī stānaṁ peddavāṁḍlu Āruvāḍlu
lōnanu tamatamavārilō tama Aṁnalu damyulu paṁcikuḍicevārilō tamapālileka nanu
bhaviṁturu śrī triyaṁbaka yī dhaṁ¨rmānaku yavaru vakramu sēsina pāpātmulu
śrībhāgīratikṣētrāna paṁcamahāpātakālu sēsina dōṣāna bōduru maṁgaḷamahāśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.18 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
